lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there, what's with all the shouting.

lines.speaker: Zamorakian recruiter
lines.text: Our all-powerful Lord Zamorak is looking for the strongest of champions, you hardly look like you fit that criteria.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am big and strong, what does he need new champions for?

lines.speaker: Zamorakian recruiter
lines.text: The glorious battlefield of Castle Wars, where we can smite down the weak followers of Saradomin needs new blood.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds neat, I'll be a champion for Zamorak.

lines.speaker: Zamorakian recruiter
lines.text: Bring death to Saradomin in his great name.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He can find a champion somewhere else, I'll pass.

lines.speaker: Zamorakian recruiter
lines.text: Fool, you'll regret this one day.

sections.title: On seasonal or permanent Deadman Mode worlds

lines.speaker: Zamorakian recruiter
lines.text: Saradomin is weak, use your strength where it's respected!

lines.speaker: Zamorakian recruiter
lines.text: Your Lord Zamorak needs your help!
